overview.consumersDescription: People taking part in this community's energy pool. Click a member to see their consumption.
overview.sourcesDescription: Generation and storage assets feeding the community.

credits.noBalances: No member settlement balances available yet.
credits.gridOperatorHint: When the community exports surplus energy, the grid operator buys it and must settle that amount. When the community imports from the grid, the operator is owed for the energy supplied.
credits.balancesHint: Balances reflect live on-chain energy credits from the PPA contract. “To settle” is outstanding debt; “receivable” is claimable once EURC is deposited.

productionConsumption.telemetryError: Could not load telemetry — showing placeholder charts.
productionConsumption.dbNotConfigured: Azure energy DB is not configured (ENERGY_DB_* env vars). Showing placeholder charts.
productionConsumption.liveDataRange: Collective consumption and production data of the whole community ({from} – {to}).
productionConsumption.noReadings: No interval readings yet for this community — showing placeholder charts.
productionConsumption.placeholderTelemetry: Placeholder telemetry — production & consumption readings will stream from the metering API.
productionConsumption.gridFlowsHint: Grid flows use explicit import/export meter readings when present; otherwise they are estimated as the community net deficit or surplus (consumption minus local production).

ownership.noOwnership: No source ownership has been recorded on-chain yet.
ownership.placeholderEstimate: Placeholder estimate — live production telemetry is not connected yet.
ownership.liveEstimate: Estimated from live production telemetry × base price × ownership share.
ownership.earningsHint: Earnings are estimated over the last 12 months from {dataType} production data. Click an owner for daily, weekly or monthly detail.

profile.title: Energy communities
profile.description: Settlement credit on the energy PPA (internal units) and USDC amounts for debt or claims. Debt settlement uses Base USDC ({address}) — ensure your community's PPA uses the same stablecoin.
profile.settleHint: Settle debt approves the PPA contract to pull the quoted USDC from your smart wallet, then calls settleOwnDebt.

shared.liveMeterData: Live interval data across {count, plural, one {# meter} other {# meters}}.

consumerCard.placeholderConsumption: Placeholder consumption — live metering data is not connected for this member yet.

energySharing.creditPolicyPlaceholder: e.g. Claim any positive balance weekly

whitelistSettlement.settlementAddressDescription: Wallet allowed to submit energy settlement data for this community (for example a backend bot).
whitelistSettlement.whitelistedDescription: Turn off to remove an address from the settlement whitelist.

enableCommunity.membersDescription: Choose members of this space and how many smart meters each one has. Investors with no meter can be left at zero.
enableCommunity.sourcesDescription: Add each generation or storage asset and split its ownership across members (shares total 100%).
enableCommunity.name: Name

optimization.optimizeDescription: Choose what matters most. The system will prioritise that goal first, then balance the others.
optimization.selfConsumptionDescription: Use locally generated energy in the community before buying from or selling to the grid.
optimization.minCo2Description: Prefer the cleanest energy available to keep carbon emissions as low as possible.
optimization.lowestPriceDescription: Keep energy costs as low as possible by using the cheapest available options.
optimization.socialAllocationDescription: Donate part of solar production to community target wallets before optimisation runs.
optimization.variableModeDescription: Donate a percentage of actual solar generation each interval.
optimization.fixedModeDescription: Donate a fixed number of kWh each 15-minute interval (grid tops up shortfalls).
optimization.targetWalletsDescription: Split the social donation across target wallets (shares total 100%).

forms.spaceRequired: Space is required to create a proposal.
forms.executorNotLoaded: Space executor is not loaded yet. Please retry in a moment.
forms.noEnergyCommunity: This space does not have an energy community yet, or it is still syncing. Please retry in a moment.

validation.distinctPriorities: Each priority must be a different objective
validation.wholeKwhPerInterval: Enter a whole number of kWh per interval
validation.addTargetWallet: Add at least one target wallet
validation.deviceIdsCommaNumbers: Device IDs must be comma-separated numbers
validation.wholeMeters: Enter a whole number of meters
validation.priceGreaterThanZero: Enter a price greater than 0 (max 2 decimals, e.g. 0.11)
validation.atLeastOneSource: At least one source is required
validation.ownerMustBeMember: This owner must also be added as a member (meter count 0 is fine) or they will not receive revenue.

errors.allowanceTimeout: Timed out waiting for stablecoin allowance.
errors.usdcNotConfigured: USDC payment token is not configured for this app.
errors.deviceIdsCommaNumbers: Device IDs must be comma-separated numbers
